introSection: Space Mountain (Cantonese: 星戰極速穿梭; Chinese: 飞越太空山) is a roller coaster at Hong Kong Disneyland.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride itself is a replica of the Space Mountain at Disneyland Park.

fullText:
Space Mountain (Cantonese: 星戰極速穿梭; Chinese: 飞越太空山) is a roller coaster at Hong Kong Disneyland.

The ride itself is a replica of the Space Mountain at Disneyland Park.
